titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/216

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=162 status=live modified=2021-04-05 09:01:57.775452+00 | translation moa=163 status=live modified=2021-04-05 09:01:59.433809+00

p.cl: Dauid Rex Scot’ . Omnibus Probis Hominibus suis totius Lodon’ . Clericis . ⁊ laicis francis ⁊ anglicicis salutem

Sciatis me dedisse . ⁊ Concessisse . Ecclesie Sancti Cudberti Iuxta castellum totam terram sub eodem castello
videlicet . a fonte qui oritur Iuxta angulum Gardini regis . per viam qua itur ad eandem ecclesiam . Et
ex altera parte sub castellum vsque peruenitur ad vnam viam . que est sub eodem castello uersus orientem
Testibus Henr’ filio Regis . Et Willelmo de Graham . Et Thor’ de Trauernent . Et Malbead de Libertona ...
David king of Scots to all worthy men of the whole of Lothian, clerk and lay, French and English, Greeting:

Know that I have given and granted to the church of St Cuthbert beside the castle the whole land beneath the same castle, namely, from the spring that rises beside the corner of the king’s garden, along the road that runs to the same church, and from the other side beneath the castle until a road is reached which is beneath the same castle towards the east.
As witnesses, Henry the king’s son, and William de Graham, and Thor of Tranent, and Malbeth of Liberton ...
